creator: brian@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I've closed this PR on the grounds that I agree with Christ's response 
and disagree with the original submitter. 

ppp.conf is intended to be enough to help a user to configure 
a client setup, and not to scare that user off with an enormous 
number of options. 

I'd welcome patches to share/examples/ppp/* if the PR submitter 
things there's anything missing or wrong there.
